insight: The frozen 40-row v1 artifact can be turned into a leakage-controlled scoring design with static, model-judge, panel, and execution-backed evaluator families while keeping precision, leaderboard, and model-score claims out of scope.
next_action: Pre-register a zero-spend packet-materialization gate that creates blinded model-judge packets from reward_hack_benchmark_v1, proves label/report/static-verdict leakage is excluded, and still runs no providers or SWE-bench executions.
